Localization.Description: Attempt to add one or more secrets (without replacement)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} added one or more secrets (without replacement) to directory {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to add one or more secrets (without replacement) to directory {object.path} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
